name: Game Development Core (Engine-Agnostic)
description: Engine-agnostic game development fundamentals for assessment, coverage, and inferred skills proposal.

subpoints.name: Delta time and frame rate independence
subpoints.description: Using dt correctly; fixed vs variable timestep.

subpoints.name: Update vs fixed-step simulation
subpoints.description: Decoupling simulation from rendering; determinism and stability.

subpoints.name: Coordinate spaces
subpoints.description: World/local/screen coordinates; conversions and camera transforms.

subpoints.name: Transforms and scene graph
subpoints.description: Parent-child transforms; hierarchy costs and update propagation.

subpoints.name: Input model
subpoints.description: Polling vs events; debouncing; mapping actions.

subpoints.name: Physics stability
subpoints.description: Tunneling, CCD, fixed timestep, solver iterations.

subpoints.name: Resource lifecycle
subpoints.description: Reference counting, unloading, memory vs performance tradeoffs.

subpoints.name: Render performance levers
subpoints.description: Draw calls, batching, overdraw, culling, LOD.

subpoints.name: Update performance levers
subpoints.description: Avoiding per-frame allocations, spatial partitioning, cache-friendly loops.

subpoints.name: Profiling workflow
subpoints.description: CPU/GPU profiling, measuring, isolating bottlenecks, verifying fixes.

subpoints.name: Determinism and tradeoffs
subpoints.description: Determinism goals, floating-point issues, lockstep constraints.
